Trigger when the user says things like "migrate X model", "add X model support", "port X from upstream vLLM", "make X work with the FL plugin", or simply "/model-migrate-flagos model_name". The model_name argument uses snake_case (e.g. qwen3_5, kimi_k25, deepseek_v4).
